results.rendered_html:
samāhita p. p.
1 Brought together, assembled.
2 Adjusted, settled.
3 Composed, collected, calm (as mind.).
4 Intent on, absorbed in, concentrated.
5 Finished.
6 Agreed upon.
7 Arranged, disposed.
8 Inferred.
9 Accomplished, finished.
10 Deposited, entrusted; see samādhā also.
— taḥ A holy man.
— taṃ Intentness, intent devotion (to any object).
